meta.title: Arslan Zafar — Software Engineer | C#/.NET · Python · AI

hero.description: I build industrial software and AI-powered solutions — from robust .NET backends and computer-vision systems with over 98% detection accuracy to modern web applications.

about.title: Software engineering with an industrial focus
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer holding a Master of Engineering in Software Engineering for Industrial Applications (Hof University, 2025), focused on C#/.NET and Python — complemented by solid experience in Java with Spring Boot and expertise in artificial intelligence and computer vision.

At F.EE IndustrieAutomation GmbH & Co. KG I built an AI system that detects connection terminals on digital circuit diagrams with over 98% accuracy and cut manual inspection effort by 65%. Along the way I developed a deep appreciation for professional standards and collaborative engineering inside a German IT company.

Before that, I spent four years at Services Ground Pvt. Ltd. — first as a software engineer building backend services and REST APIs with Java and Spring Boot, later as a project manager leading an interdisciplinary team of eight in agile environments.

facts.locationValue: Bad Neustadt a. d. Saale, Bavaria, Germany

about.goals: I want to build AI-powered systems for industry that deliver measurable value — while growing professionally toward software architecture and applied machine learning.

experience.title: Work experience
experience.subtitle: From full-stack development and agile team leadership to AI systems for industrial automation.

feeThesis.summary: Thesis: detection and highlighting of connection terminals on digital circuit diagrams using artificial intelligence.
highlights: Achieved over 98% detection accuracy by training a YOLOv5 CNN model
Reduced manual inspection effort by 65% with an AI-powered RPA system
Validated terminal data via OCR integration with a 95% hit rate
Built and annotated a training dataset of 1,200 images in YOLO format
Integrated AI results into the C# application via a Blazor dashboard and Python.NET
Ensured production readiness with 85% test coverage across unit, integration and load tests

feeIntern.summary: Internship semester in the ERP domain: backend modules, REST interfaces and quality assurance.
highlights: Developed ERP warehouse modules in C#/.NET with a service layer and DTOs
Sped up ERP data access by 40% through optimized LINQ queries
Delivered REST endpoints in ASP.NET Core with asynchronous handlers
Implemented a chat and feedback module with Entity Framework Core and SQLite
Reduced release defects through integration testing with xUnit and Postman

sgPm.summary: Led an interdisciplinary development team with responsibility for delivery, quality and infrastructure.
highlights: Led an interdisciplinary team of 8 using Scrum and Kanban
Cut defect density by 30% via Jira dashboards and continuous process improvement
Shortened release cycles by 35% with CI/CD using Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD and Docker
Improved scalability and availability through cloud deployments on AWS and Azure
Safeguarded code quality with mandatory pull-request workflows and code reviews

sgDev.summary: Full-stack development for a stock-trading platform and client projects.
highlights: Built the backend of a stock-trading platform (richtv.io) with Java and Spring Boot
Created reusable REST APIs for cross-application data exchange
Implemented responsive frontend interfaces with ReactJS and Bootstrap
Delivered client websites with PHP and WordPress

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection across AI, IoT, cloud and full-stack development.

terminalAi.title: AI Terminal Detection for Circuit Diagrams
terminalAi.description: Deep-learning system that automatically detects and highlights connection terminals on digital circuit diagrams and validates them via OCR — integrated into an industrial C# application with a Blazor dashboard.
terminalAi.achievement: 98% detection accuracy, 65% less manual inspection effort

greenhouse.title: Smart Greenhouse Farming System
greenhouse.description: IoT-based greenhouse system built with M5Stack and MicroPython for real-time monitoring of environmental conditions. Soil-moisture, climate and light sensors drive automated irrigation; a PHP dashboard visualizes all data.
greenhouse.achievement: Automated irrigation driven by sensor thresholds

wanderWave.title: Wander Wave Tourism
wanderWave.description: Cloud-based tourism management system built with PHP (Yii2) and deployed on AWS. User authentication and account management for personalized itineraries, plus ownCloud integration for secure storage of user-generated content.
wanderWave.achievement: Scalable, secure travel-planning platform on AWS

proShop.title: Pro-Shop E-Commerce
proShop.description: Full-stack e-commerce application built on the MERN stack: RESTful APIs for product management, user authentication and order processing with PayPal integration, plus role-based access control for admin and customer areas.
proShop.achievement: Complete checkout flow including PayPal payments

richtv.title: RichTV — Stock-Trading Platform
richtv.description: Backend of a stock-trading platform built with Java and Spring Boot: reusable REST APIs for cross-application data exchange and responsive frontend interfaces built with ReactJS.
